description: Contact Detail Action Button Wiring. 18 buttons without onClick handlers: Email (1133), Log Call (1139), Log Activity submit (1426), Add Deal (1872), Create Ticket (1917), Upload (1958), Add Note (2007, 2214), View Map (1341), Play Recording (969), Download (1039), Reply/React/Add Note/Share activity actions (1076-1099), toolbar buttons (1410/1415/1420). Zero useMutation calls on entire page (F-04, F-05, F-06, F-23). Need: add logActivity mutation, wire compose/call to existing components, wire action buttons. Audit: docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md §11,§16.

audit_findings_resolved.actual: Resolved. Audit was stale: F-23/F-06 already wired by prior tasks (5 useMutation calls + QuickLogComposer). Wired the genuinely-dead buttons: Email->EmailCompose sheet, Log Call->logActivity CALL dialog, Add Deal->/deals/new?contactId, View Map->Google Maps from composed address; removed 2 dataless no-ops (Play Recording, Download).

test_coverage.actual: diff-coverage (new_coverage) 81.8% (45/55) >= 80% floor; 4 extracted component/helper modules 100% covered by 56 new tests. page.tsx (10 thin lines) is excluded from the merged coverage report. Full coverage 85.54%->85.75%.

validations.name: Tests
validations.command: pre-ship unit-tests + integration-tests (31988 passed/42 skipped; 56 new contacts component/page tests)

notes: Contact audit finding: F-04,F-05,F-06,F-23. See docs/audit/contact-detail-wiring-audit.md. Spec (2026-06-12): audit is stale — logActivity/addNote mutations + 5 useMutation calls already wired by IFC-220/253/256/227. Real remaining scope = genuinely-dead buttons: Email (EmailCompose sheet), Log Call (logActivity CALL via Dialog), Add Deal (navigate), View Map, Play Recording, Download. Merge stub deferred to IFC-262.
